title: Pazaak Weekly
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Pazaak Weekly''' was a [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] themed magazine for pazaak enthusiasts, players and addicts all over the [[Galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]]. It was known to list upcoming tournaments on Manaan.

[[Firith Me]] was a devoted reader.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''

[[Category:Publications and journals]]
